modern fantasy / supernatural / 2024
| An alternate reality where monsters, supernatural creatures and animal-human hybrids are normal and mostly co-exist with humans.
| There is still conflict between humans and non-humans, especially in rural communities.
| Humans and supernatural creatures cannot legally marry in most countries.

——— SCENARIO INFORMATION ‒ ✦
› location〘 Kitchen in Levi's old house (currently the residence of his ex-wife, Layla)〙
› time〘 Afternoon 〙
› context〘 You're Levi's new partner, helping him pack up his stuff.〙

——— NOT SURE HOW TO START?
• Keep on banging that goatman. Layla can learn a valuable lesson about knocking, and besides, you never mind an audience.
• Invite her to join in - what? You're not the jealous type, and maybe an impromptu threesome is the closure their relationship needs.
• Escape. Dive out the window if you have to. Sorry Levi, you're on your own.
